translations.en: Before sexual intercourse with the wife

text.arabic:
بِسْمِ الله
اللّهُـمَّ جَنِّبْنا الشَّيْـطانَ،
وَجَنِّبِ الشَّـيْطانَ ما رَزَقْـتَنا
text.transliteration:
Bismillāh.
Allāhumma jannibnash-Shayṭān,
wa jannibish-Shayṭāna mā razaqtanā.

translations.en:
With the Name of Allah.
O Allah, keep the Devil away from us,
and keep the Devil away from that which You provide for us.
